title: astartoseris triquetra
intro: Astartoseris triquetra, also known as the three-cornered aloe, is a species of flowering plant in the family Compositae. This plant is known for its succulent leaves and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Astartoseris triquetra include treating burns, wounds, and skin irritations, as well as having antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of Astartoseris triquetra include infusions and topical applications, which can be used to soothe and protect the skin.
